title: GD Naidu flyover to remain closed on nights of May 14 to 18 for repair work
summary: Coimbatore traffic police have announced full nightly closure of the GD Naidu flyover from May 14 to 18 for emergency repairs and resurfacing. Diversions are routed via Avinashi Road and Trichy Road service lanes.

title: Coimbatore secures third place nationally in Panchayat Awards 2025
summary: Coimbatore district panchayat has bagged the third national rank in the Panchayat Awards 2025, recognised for governance reforms, citizen services and SDG localisation efforts.

title: 60+ TASMAC outlets in Coimbatore district identified for closure
summary: Following the state directive on phased prohibition, more than 60 TASMAC liquor outlets across Coimbatore district have been listed for closure, with women's groups welcoming the move.

title: Coimbatore AIADMK functionary Advocate Vineeth joins TVK
summary: Senior AIADMK functionary Advocate Vineeth has formally joined TVK in Coimbatore, in another sign of cadre churn ahead of the new government's first floor test.

title: Coimbatore cop arrested after woman accuses him of threats and forced abortion
summary: A Coimbatore city police personnel has been arrested after a woman lodged a complaint accusing him of issuing threats and forcing her to undergo an abortion. A departmental probe has been ordered.

title: Heavy rain warning: Paralikkadu ecotourism temporarily closed
summary: Eco-tourism activities at Paralikkadu and trekking on Velliangiri Hills have been suspended after a heavy rain warning was issued for the Coimbatore-Nilgiris stretch.

title: Corporation commissioner orders immediate removal of public space encroachments
summary: The Coimbatore Corporation commissioner has directed zonal officers to immediately remove encroachments on pavements and public spaces, with daily compliance reports.
